case_title: WILLIAM R INGEBRETSEN ET AL VS. RICHELLE RAGSDELL

docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS COPIED TO ACCOUNTING FILED BY PLAINTIFF INGEBRETSEN, CARMEL G
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS COPIED TO ACCOUNTING FILED BY PLAINTIFF INGEBRETSEN, WILLIAM R

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INGEBRETSEN, WILLIAM R INGEBRETSEN, CARMEL G INGEBRETSEN, KIRSTEN R RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAGSDELL, RICHELLE $2,346.50 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,396.50, DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,346.50 AGAINST THIS JUDGMENT DUE TO THE DISPOSITION IN CSM-15-849020. SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT RAGSDELL, RICHELLE

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INGEBRETSEN, WILLIAM R INGEBRETSEN, CARMEL G INGEBRETSEN, KIRSTEN R RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAGSDELL, RICHELLE $2,346.50 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,546.50, ***CORRECTED AS TO COSTS (ADDED $150 SERVICE FEE)***DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,346.50 AGAINST THIS JUDGMENT DUE TO THE DISPOSITION IN CSM-15-849020. SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT RAGSDELL, RICHELLE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RAGSDELL, RICHELLE
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS COPIED TO ACCOUNTING FILED BY PLAINTIFF INGEBRETSEN, KIRSTEN R
DECLARATION RE: CORRECTED ADDRESS OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF INGEBRETSEN, KIRSTEN R
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $201.53 RE 33773 FOR TRANSACTION W0515C30D013 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO WILLIAM/CARMEL/KIRSTEN INGEBRETSEN, DOC#1907552342, WARRANT #38204360, DATED MAY-12-2016

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2015 BY HON. DONALD S. MITCHELL; THE PLAINTIFF APPEARS; THE DEFENDANT APPEARS; NO EXHIBITS RETAINED; NOT REPORTED. CLERK: M.L.MANZELLA (DEPT. 506).
